title: oberonia boerlageana
intro: Oberonia boerlageana is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid that is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Oberonia boerlageana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical treatment.
